scope: Create machine-run SENTRY regression harness for deliberation governance v2.7
Consolidate pass-3 live failure probes into one deterministic test pack
Prove B_NO_ROSTER_GATE, B_LB_METADATA, N5, N1, N2, N3, N6b, N11, CLEANUP_DB_FINGERPRINT
Emit REGRESSION_RUN_RESULT.json receipt on every run
Wire npm run lifeos:deliberation:regression for local + optional Railway layer
BP-only phase 1 — no production logic changes until harness trusted
non_goals: Changing gate validators or service logic in this mission
Founder decisions during BPB or CDR phases
Deleting legacy behavior/snt-live scripts before harness parity proven
Neon DELETE without --confirm on cleanup script
target_users: CDR (low-tier implementer executes frozen BP steps only)
ChC (orchestration — observe BPB → SENTRY → CDR sequence)
success_criteria: FOUNDER_PACKET + PRODUCT_DEVELOPMENT_RESULT pass BPB intake gate
BLUEPRINT.json lists exact files, exact probe IDs, exact commands, exact expected pass/fail
Low-tier coder can implement without product judgment
Same-tier coder output materially identical across two runs (deterministic harness)
Harness fails if a validator is stubbed (negative control documented in BP step)
Harness passes on current main after fixes from deliberation v2.7 mission
No production mutation except optional cleanup with --confirm + fingerprint pass
failure_criteria: BP omits any probe ID from REGRESSION_PROBE_CATALOG.json
BP allows silent skip when Railway env missing (must fail-closed with receipt)
Tests pass while ROSTER_MISSING or sticky load_bearing regressions reintroduced
SENTRY certifies harness mission before BP audit
BuilderOS makes product decisions instead of translating probe catalog to steps
tradeoffs: Consolidate vs keep separate behavior + snt-live scripts — consolidate with thin wrapper deprecation
Mock-only vs live-first — both layers required; local mock always runs; live optional with env

authority.sentry: audit BP before any CDR step
authority.cdr: implement harness files only — no validator edits
authority.hist: owns probe catalog + legacy script references

escalation.rule: Harness probe fail → CDR fixes harness only; validator bug → separate REPAIR mission after harness trusted

founder_attention_budget.note: Adam authorized harness-only test of BuilderOS 2026-05-24; observe via OBSERVE.md commands

forbidden_carry_forward: Prose-only acceptance without command + expected exit code
Claiming BuilderOS alpha from harness alone

risk_register.risk: BP drifts from probe catalog IDs
risk_register.mitigation: ACCEPTANCE_TESTS.json must reference catalog probe id per test row
CLEANUP_DB_FINGERPRINT probe mandatory before any --confirm cleanup

founder_decision_log: 2026-05-24: First BuilderOS spin test = SENTRY regression harness only (not feature build)
2026-05-24: Sequence locked — FP → BPB BP → SENTRY audit BP → CDR implement → run harness → then repair mission if needed
2026-05-24: Probe IDs B_NO_ROSTER_GATE, B_LB_METADATA, N5, N1, N2, N3, N6b, N11 + cleanup fingerprint are authoritative
freeze_criteria: BLUEPRINT.json SENTRY audit PASS before step S1 execute

change_control.rule: Probe ID or expect shape change requires new founder_decision_log row

steps_outline.title: Package.json script + mission ACCEPTANCE_TESTS.json
steps_outline.note: Also create ACCEPTANCE_TESTS.json in mission folder

steps_outline.title: Thin wrappers deprecating duplicate scripts (optional exit-0 delegate)
steps_outline.constraint: May delegate to harness --layer=local only; preserve exit codes

steps_outline.title: Document operator runbook in mission README

blueprint_contract_for_bpb.determinism_requirement: Two consecutive local runs must produce identical pass/fail probe list (timestamps/session_ids may differ)
